page.title: Add-ons
page.description: A curated catalog for this box: one-click apps that deploy with backups, routing, and HTTPS, plus managed databases you add to your apps.

card.shared: One shared instance serves every app

installed.confirmDescription: This removes the app and permanently deletes its data — its containers and volumes. This cannot be undone.
installed.confirmDescriptionWithDb: This removes the app and permanently deletes its data — its containers and volumes, plus its managed {{engine}} database. This cannot be undone.

addToApp.title: Add {{name}} to an app
addToApp.warningShared: The first {{name}} database starts a shared instance (~{{mb}} MB) on this box. Later databases reuse it.
addToApp.warningPerApp: Uses roughly {{mb}} MB of RAM on this box.
addToApp.note: VAC injects the connection string as an env var and schedules a nightly backup. Redeploy the app to pick it up.

install.title: Install {{name}}
install.warning: Runs on this box and uses roughly {{mb}} MB of RAM.
install.warningWithDb: Runs on this box and uses roughly {{mb}} MB of RAM, plus a managed {{engine}} database.
